name: golang-github-xdg-go-stringprep-dev
title: golang-github-xdg-go-stringprep-dev
summary: RFC-3454 stringprep and RFC-4013 SASLprep in Go (library)
description:
RFC-3454 stringprep and RFC-4013 SASLprep in Go (library)
This library provides an implementation of the stringprep algorithm
(RFC-3454) in Go, including all data tables.
.
A pre-built SASLprep (RFC-4013) profile is provided as well.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-xdg-go-stringprep-dev because RFC-3454 stringprep and RFC-4013 SASLprep in Go (library).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-xdg-go-stringprep-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-xdg-go-stringprep-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-xdg-go-stringprep-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
